texto: I know you feel that everything's been taken away from you. But you'll get things back. It just won't be quite like before. But it'll still be good.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Naomi Hirahara: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I know you feel that everything's been taken away from you. But you'll get things back. It just w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, healing, everything pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
